sports.name: Sunday Funday Ride — SF to San Jose
sports.venue: Meet 1: 1 Bryant St, SF (Impark lot, KSU 9am) → Meet 2: Livermore (KSU 10am)
sports.address: 1 Bryant St, San Francisco, CA 94110 (Impark Parking Lot)
sports.why: A full-day backroads epic — Mines Rd, Mt. Hamilton and Del Puerto Canyon, not a coffee-and-back meetup; advanced riders only
sports.summary: All-day group motorcycle ride, Sun Jul 26. Per flyer, two meets: 1st at 1 Bryant St, SF (Impark lot), KSU 9:00am SHARP; 2nd at 1650 N Livermore Ave, Livermore (Jack in the Box), KSU 10:00am. Route runs Mines Rd, Mt. Hamilton, San Antonio Valley Rd and Del Puerto Canyon Rd, with a taco lunch stop in Patterson, ending in San Jose (~6-hr ride). Free. NOT recommended for beginners; gear recommended.
